goal: Tax agent prod-readiness: maximize TaxCalcBench by_line scored THROUGH the unified matrix (runProfileMatrix multi-shot), with the RL corpus as free exhaust
status: substrate MERGED to main (agent-runtime#90 + agent-eval#150); UNPUBLISHED (publish=tag-push+lockstep bump)

metricClaims.by_line: Fraction of Form 1040 lines matching ground truth (objective XPath, ungameable). If it rises, the agent emits more correct line values → fewer wrong numbers the user must catch → directly the product's core value (a correct return). Not a proxy.
metricClaims.tool_call_rate: Whether the agent invokes its calculators/toolkit. Product-mode standalone proved tools lift by_line 0.316→0.684; a prod-faithful eval must elicit + measure tool use.
metricClaims.cost_usd: Per-return cost via real token capture. Prod-readiness gate + dataset provenance both require honest cost; currently 0 (extractLlmCallEvent seam).

baseline.note: Matrix pipeline WORKS (proven live) but not yet realizing the tool-use lift; 2 shots were identical (temp 0) so best-of-N is degenerate.

architecture: ONE pipeline: runProfileMatrix(profiles, scenarios=cases, dispatch=loopDispatch(runLoop multi-shot driver↔worker), judges=[taxcalc XPath], reps) → RunRecords → corpus (free dataset) → gate. Every product plugs agent-as-dispatch + scorer-as-judge. Un-fragmented.
shipped: agent-runtime#90: done-event cost seam (integrity:assert unblocked, cost dim real)
agent-eval#150: multi-dim raw (cost/tokens/latency/efficiency every run, RAW-only)
agent-eval#150 (extended): corpus-by-default via corpusText — records ARE CorpusRecords, no side-channel
MERGED #90 + #150 to main (reversible); publish pending — needs version bump + v* tag + npm/PyPI lockstep
